name: Figma
philosophy: A confident black-and-white editorial frame interrupted by oversized, hand-cut pastel color blocks.
trademark_signals: Monochrome system core: (black) and (white) carry every CTA, every body line, every footer link
Oversized pastel color-block sections (, , , ) define the narrative rhythm of every long-form page
Pill is the only button shape — for text CTAs, for icon buttons. No square buttons anywhere
figmaSans variable typeface used at unusually fine weight increments (320, 330, 340, 450, 480, 540)
Tight negative letter-spacing on display sizes (-1.72px at 86px, -0.96px at 64px) creates a confident editorial cadence
ai_slop_avoided: introduce mid-gray text. Body hierarchy comes from figmaSans weight, not from opacity
add drop shadows to color-block sections — the color is the depth device
introduce new accent colors outside the documented palette and. Adding, e.g., a saturated brand orange would break the system
